source: National Park Service — Glacier Bay National Park & Preserve
title: Huna Tlingit carrying a totem pole in ceremonial dress
description: A group of Huna Tlingit men in ceremonial regalia, including painted hats and robes, carry a freshly carved totem pole. The photograph was published by NPS in connection with the Xunaa Shuká Hít (Huna Ancestors' House) tribal house dedication at Bartlett Cove in Glacier Bay National Park, documenting the living cultural ties between Hoonah and Glacier Bay.
alt: A group of Huna Tlingit men in ceremonial regalia carry a totem pole along a forest path
